sentences.target: J'adresse un mail au service client.

translations.fr: J'adresse un mail au service client.
translations.en: I’m sending an email to customer support.
translations.es: Estoy enviando un correo electrónico al servicio de atención al cliente.
translations.de: Ich sende eine E-Mail an den Kundenservice.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在给客服发送邮件。
translations.yue: 我而家發封電郵俾客服。
translations.ru: Я отправляю электронное письмо в службу поддержки.
translations.pt: Estou enviando um e‑mail para o atendimento ao cliente.
translations.vi: Tôi đang gửi email đến bộ phận hỗ trợ khách hàng.
translations.ar: أرسل بريدًا إلكترونيًا إلى خدمة العملاء.
translations.nl: Ik stuur een e-mail naar de klantenservice.
translations.uk: Я надсилаю електронний лист до служби підтримки.
translations.hi: मैं ग्राहक सहायता को ईमेल भेज रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg sender en e‑post til kundeservice.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengirim email ke layanan pelanggan.
translations.sv: Jag skickar ett mejl till kundtjänst.
translations.ro: Trimit un e‑mail către serviciul clienți.
translations.da: Jeg sender en e‑mail til kundeservice.
translations.ja: カスタマーサポートにメールを送っています。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative of 'adresser'; includes elided subject clitic 'j'' (from 'je') before a vowel.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'mail'.
Common noun; direct object of 'J'adresse'. In contemporary French, often refers to an email.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces the indirect object NP.
Common noun; head of the NP 'service client' governed by 'au'.
Common noun modifying 'service' to form the compound 'service client' (customer service).

sentences.target: Tu adresses la carte à Léa.

translations.fr: Tu adresses la carte à Léa.
translations.en: You’re addressing the postcard to Lea.
translations.es: Estás dirigiendo la postal a Léa.
translations.de: Du adressierst die Postkarte an Léa.
translations.it: Stai indirizzando la cartolina a Léa.
translations.ko: 엽서를 레아에게 보내도록 주소를 쓰고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把这张明信片寄给莱娅。
translations.yue: 你而家喺度將呢張明信片寄畀莉亞。
translations.pt: Você está endereçando o cartão postal para Léa.
translations.vi: Bạn đang ghi địa chỉ tấm bưu thiếp gửi cho Léa.
translations.ar: أنت تُعنون البطاقة البريدية إلى ليا.
translations.nl: Je adresseert de ansichtkaart aan Léa.
translations.hi: तुम पोस्टकार्ड लेआ के नाम पर लिख रहे हो।
translations.el: Απευθύνεις την καρτ ποστάλ στη Λέα.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menuliskan alamat kartu pos untuk Léa.
translations.ja: レア宛てにハガキの宛名を書いています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, 2nd person singular present indicative of 'adresser'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'carte'.
Common noun; direct object of 'adresses'.
Preposition introducing the recipient of the action.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'à' (recipient).

sentences.target: Le médecin m'adresse à un spécialiste.

translations.fr: Le médecin m'adresse à un spécialiste.
translations.en: The doctor is referring me to a specialist.
translations.es: El médico me deriva a un especialista.
translations.de: Der Arzt überweist mich an einen Facharzt.
translations.it: Il medico mi manda da uno specialista.
translations.zh-Hans: 医生把我转诊到专科医生。
translations.yue: 醫生轉介我去睇專科醫生。
translations.pt: O médico está me encaminhando para um especialista.
translations.tr: Doktor beni bir uzmana sevk ediyor.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ đang chuyển tôi đến bác sĩ chuyên khoa.
translations.nl: De arts verwijst me naar een specialist.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मुझे एक विशेषज्ञ के पास भेज रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ο γιατρός με παραπέμπει σε ειδικό.
translations.nb: Legen henviser meg til en spesialist.
translations.id: Dokter merujuk saya ke seorang spesialis.
translations.sv: Läkaren remitterar mig till en specialist.
translations.ro: Medicul mă trimite la un specialist.
translations.da: Lægen henviser mig til en specialist.
translations.ja: 医者が私を専門医に紹介しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'médecin'.
Common noun; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present of 'adresser'; enclitic 'm'' (from 'me') marks a 1st person singular object ('me') of the verb.
Preposition introducing the destination.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'spécialiste'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Je veux adresser une demande au maire.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø adʁese yn dəmɑ̃d o mɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux adresser une demande au maire.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø adʁese yn dəmɑ̃d o mɛʁ/
translations.en: I want to send a request to the mayor.
translations.es: Quiero enviar una solicitud al alcalde.
translations.de: Ich möchte eine Anfrage an den Bürgermeister schicken.
translations.it: Voglio inviare una richiesta al sindaco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想向市长提交一份申请。
translations.yue: 我想向市長遞交一份申請。
translations.pt: Quero enviar um pedido ao prefeito.
translations.he: אני רוצה לשלוח בקשה לראש העיר.
translations.tr: Belediye başkanına bir dilekçe göndermek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn gửi một đơn yêu cầu cho thị trưởng.
translations.ar: أريد أن أرسل طلبًا إلى رئيس البلدية.
translations.nl: Ik wil een verzoek naar de burgemeester sturen.
translations.hi: मैं मेयर को एक आवेदन भेजना चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Θέλω να στείλω ένα αίτημα στον δήμαρχο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil sende en søknad til ordføreren.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengirim permohonan kepada wali kota.
translations.sv: Jag vill skicka en begäran till borgmästaren.
translations.ro: Vreau să trimit o cerere primarului.
translations.da: Jeg vil sende en anmodning til borgmesteren.
translations.ja: 市長に申請を提出したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, 1st person singular present of 'vouloir'; takes infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'demande'.
Common noun; direct object of 'adresser'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the indirect object NP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au'.
